audit_items.proof_trace: mtest.c is a standalone test/toy program (labeled as such in its header) with its own main() and no network interface — it is never linked into the LDAP server and cannot be triggered by a remote LDAP attacker. While malloc at line 41 is unchecked and values[i] at line 44 would NPD on allocation failure, this is a code quality issue in a local-only CLI test tool. The property's 'external-reachable via LDAP' reachability classification is incorrect; no LDAP protocol path leads to this code.
